boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the privacy operator execute the requested data release, deletion, transfer, or sharing action? Focus: cross-border transfer inside approved SCC and region scope.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Source records do not close the transfer dependency.

final_answer: Source control records do not close the exact cross-border transfer boundary. The controlling record says the transfer clause, region, and data class match are missing, stale, mismatched, expired, or scoped to a different action. Business urgency or supportive tone cannot authorize execution, so the decision remains ESCALATE.
